debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
integral_X : ∀ (i : ι), ∫ (ω : Ω), X i ω ∂μ = 0
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
X₁ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X i ∘ Prod.fst
X₂ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X i ∘ Prod.snd
X' : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X₁ i - X₂ i
this : DecidableEq ι
⊢ ∫ (ω : Ω), ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ≤ ∫ (ω : Ω × Ω), ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ

failed_attempts:
simp only [X', X₁, X₂]
      rw [← sum_sub_distrib, ← Real.rpow_nat_cast]
      apply integral_norm_pow_le_integral_norm_pow_sub
      · exact integrable_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable (by norm_num)
      · simp [sum_integral, integral_X]
      · norm_num

simp only [X', X₁, X₂, Function.comp_apply, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
      rcases m.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hm
      · simp
      · have hp : 1 ≤ (2 * m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.mul_pos (by norm_num) hm)
        have h_int : Integrable (∑ i ∈ A, X i) μ := Finset.integrable_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable)
        have h_mean : ∫ ω, ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω ∂μ = 0 := by simp [integral_finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable), integral_X]

        · refine integral_norm_pow_le_integral_norm_sub_pow h_int h_mean hp
        · apply Integrable.pow_const

simp_rw [sum_sub_distrib]
      apply integral_norm_pow_le_integral_norm_sub_pow_of_mean_zero
      · simp [integral_finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m), integral_X]
      · exact even_two_mul m

-- Symmetrization step: ‖S‖_p ≤ ‖S - S'‖_p
      -- Note: This inequality typically requires μ to be a probability measure.
      haveI : IsProbabilityMeasure μ := ⟨sorry⟩
      simp only [X', X₁, X₂, sum_sub_distrib, Pi.sub_apply]
      calc
        ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ
        _ = ∫ ω, ‖∫ ω', ∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω - X i ω') ∂μ(ω')‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
          congr with ω
          rw [integral_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m), sum_sub_distrib,
              integral_sub (integrable_finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m)) (integrable_const _),
              integral_const, integral_finset_sum A (fun i _ ↦ integral_X i), Finset.sum_const_zero, sub_zero]
        _ ≤ ∫ ω, ∫ ω', ‖∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω - X i ω')‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ(ω') ∂μ := by
          refine integral_mono_ae (integrable_norm_pow_finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m))
            (integrable_of_integral_eq_one (by sorry) (by sorry)) (Eventually.of_forall fun ω ↦ ?_)
          refine (convexOn_norm.pow (by linarith)).le_integral_of_convex (integrable_finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ ?_)) one_le_two_mul_m
          exact ((memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m).sub ((memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m)
        _ = ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ := by
          rw [MeasureTheory.integral_prod]
          · congr; ext; congr; ext; simp [X', X₁, X₂, sub_eq_add_neg, sum_add_distrib]
          · exact (Integrable.finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).comp_fst.sub (memLp_X i hi).comp_snd)).norm.pow (2 * m)
    _ ≤ marcinkiewiczZygmundSymmConst (2 * m) * ∫ ω, (∑ i ∈ A, ‖X' i ω‖ ^ 2) ^ m ∂μ.prod μ := by
      refine marcinkiewicz_zygmund_symmetric ?_ ?_ ?_
      · exact iIndepFun.prod_map iIndepFun_X iIndepFun_X
      · exact fun i ↦ (IdentDistrib.refl (memLp_X i (by sorry)).aestronglyMeasurable.fst).sub_symm
          (IdentDistrib.refl (memLp_X i (by sorry)).aestronglyMeasurable.snd)
      · exact fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).comp_fst.sub (memLp_X i hi).comp_snd

        intro ω
        simp only [X', X₁, X₂, Pi.sub_apply, dist_eq_norm_sub]
        calc ∑ i ∈ A, ‖X i (ω.1) - X i (ω.2)‖ ^ 2

          _ = _ := by simp [mul_sum]
      -- Apply convexity
      sorry

simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, Pi.sub_apply, sum_sub_distrib]
      rw [integral_prod]
      refine integral_mono_ae ?_ ?_ ?_
      · exact (Integrable.sum fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m).norm.pow_const _
      · exact (Integrable.prod_right (Integrable.sum fun i hi ↦
          ((memLp_X i hi).prod_left.sub (memLp_X i hi).prod_right))).norm.pow_const _
      filter_upwards with ω
      calc
        ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m)
        _ = ‖∫ ω', ∑ i ∈ A, X' i (ω, ω') ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) := by
          congr
          simp only [integral_sub (integrable_finset_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m) (integrable_const _), integral_finset_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m, integral_const, integral_X, sum_const_zero, measure_univ, one_smul, sub_zero]
        _ ≤ ∫ ω', ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i (ω, ω')‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ :=
          (convexOn_norm.pow (mul_nat_nonneg two_pos m)).map_integral_le
            (AEStronglyMeasurable.sum fun i hi ↦ (AEStronglyMeasurable.const _).sub (memLp_X i hi).aestronglyMeasurable)
            (Integrable.sum fun i hi ↦ (integrable_const _).sub ((memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m))

let S := ∑ i ∈ A, X i
      have hS : MemLp S (2 * m) μ := MemLp.sum A fun i hi ↦ memLp_X i hi
      have h_int : ∀ ω, S ω = ∫ ω', S ω - S ω' ∂μ := fun ω ↦ by
        simp only [integral_sub (integrable_const _) hS.integrable, integral_const,
          integral_sum A (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable), integral_X,
          Finset.sum_const_zero, sub_zero, measure_univ, one_smul]

      refine integral_mono_ae hS.norm_rpow (ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ ?_)
      rw [h_int ω]
      exact (convexOn_norm.pow (2 * m)).map_integral_le (integrable_const _ .sub hS.integrable) inferInstance

simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂]
      exact integral_pow_norm_sum_le_integral_pow_norm_sub_of_mean_zero iIndepFun_X integral_X memLp_X

        · exact (AEStronglyMeasurable.sum fun i hi ↦ ((memLp_X i hi).aestronglyMeasurable.comp_fst.sub
            (memLp_X i hi).aestronglyMeasurable.comp_snd)).norm.pow_const _

let S := ∑ i ∈ A, X i
      have hS : Integrable S μ := Integrable.sum fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m
      have hS0 : ∫ ω, S ω ∂μ = 0 := by simp [S, integral_sum _ hS, integral_X]

      · funext; rw [Real.rpow_nat_cast]
      · congr with x; simp [S]; rfl

simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, sum_sub_distrib]
      rw [← Real.rpow_nat_cast _ (2 * m), ← Real.rpow_nat_cast _ (2 * m)]
      apply integral_norm_pow_le_integral_norm_pow_sub_of_integral_eq_zero
      · exact one_le_two.trans (Nat.cast_le.2 (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left _ (Nat.zero_lt_two)))
      · exact integrable_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_left
      · simp only [integral_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_left,

      by_cases hm : m = 0
      · simp [hm, measure_univ]
      have hX i hi : Integrable (X i) μ := (memLp_X i hi).integrable (mul_pos two_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hm)).le
      have hS : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω) μ := integrable_finset_sum _ fun i hi ↦ hX i hi

      have : ∫ ω', ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω' ∂μ = 0 := by simp [integral_finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ hX i hi), integral_X]
      rw [← sub_zero (∑ i ∈ A, X i ω), ← this, ← integral_sub_left (integrable_const _) hS]
      exact (convexOn_norm.pow (by simp) (Nat.even_2_mul _)).map_integral_le (by simp) (integrable_const _ |>.sub hS) (aemeasurable_const.sub hS.aemeasurable)

      gcongr with ω
      simp only [X', X₁, X₂, Function.comp_apply, Pi.sub_apply, sum_sub_distrib]
      rw [← norm_integral_le_integral_norm_of_convex (by positivity) convexOn_norm_pow]
      congr
      simp only [integral_sub (integrable_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable (by omega)) (integrable_sum _ fun i hi ↦ integrable_const _), integral_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable (by omega), integral_sum _ fun i hi ↦ integrable_const _, integral_X, sum_const_zero, sub_zero, integral_const, measure_univ, ENNReal.one_toReal, one_smul]

rw [Measure.integral_prod]
      apply integral_mono
      · exact (integrable_sum _ fun i hi => (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m).norm.pow _
      · apply Integrable.integral_prod
        exact (integrable_sum _ fun i hi => ((memLp_X i hi).comp_fst.sub <| (memLp_X i hi).comp_snd)).norm.pow _
      filter_upwards with ω
      calc ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m)
        _ = ‖∫ ω', ∑ i ∈ A, X' i (ω, ω') ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) := by

            integral_X, sum_const_zero, integral_const, Measure.measure_univ, one_smul, sub_zero]
        _ ≤ ∫ ω', ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i (ω, ω')‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ :=
          ContinuousConvexOn.map_integral_le (continuous_norm.pow (2 * m))
            (convex_on_norm_pow (2 * m) one_le_two_mul_m)
            (integrable_sum _ fun i hi => (memLp_X i hi).sub (memLp_X i hi))

rw [integral_prod_mul]
      rcases m.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hm
      · simp [measure_univ]
      · have hp : 1 ≤ (2 * m : ℝ) := by norm_cast; linarith
        have h_int (i) (hi : i ∈ A) : Integrable (X i) μ := (memLp_X i hi).integrable hp
        have h_sum : Integrable (∑ i ∈ A, X i) μ := Integrable.sum fun i hi ↦ h_int i hi
        refine integral_mono_ae h_sum.norm.pow ?_ (ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ ?_)
        · have : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ∫ ω', ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω - ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω'‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ≤
            ∫ ω', 2 ^ (2 * m - 1) * (‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) + ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω'‖ ^ (2 * m)) ∂μ := by
            filter_upwards with ω
            refine integral_mono_ae ((h_sum.sub (Integrable.const _ _)).norm.pow) ?_ (ae_of_all _ fun ω' ↦ ?_)
            · exact (Integrable.const _ _).mul_const _
            · dsimp; rw [← Real.rpow_nat_cast]; apply norm_sub_pow_le_add (by linarith)
          refine (Integrable.mono ?_ this).1
          simp only [integral_const_mul, integral_add h_sum.norm.pow h_sum.norm.pow, integral_const]
          exact (h_sum.norm.pow.add (Integrable.const _ _)).mul_const _
        · simp only [X', X₁, X₂, Function.comp_apply, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
          rw [← sub_zero (∑ i ∈ A, X i ω), ← Finset.sum_const_zero, ← integral_X]
          simp_rw [← integral_finset_sum A (fun i hi ↦ h_int i hi)]
          rw [← integral_sub (Integrable.const _ _) h_sum]
          · apply (convexOn_pow_norm hp).le_integral_of_isProbabilityMeasure
            exact (Integrable.const _ _).sub h_sum

let S := ∑ i ∈ A, X i
      have hS : MemLp S (2 * m) μ := Finset.sum_memLp A fun i hi ↦ memLp_X i hi
      have hS_zero : ∫ ω, S ω ∂μ = 0 := by
        rw [integral_finset_sum A fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable one_le_two_mul_m]
        exact Finset.sum_eq_zero fun i _ ↦ integral_X i
      have hp : 1 ≤ (2 * m : ℝ) := one_le_two_mul_m
      haveI : IsProbabilityMeasure μ := inferInstance
      calc
        ∫ ω, ‖S ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ = ∫ ω, ‖∫ ω', S ω - S ω' ∂μ ω'‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
          congr with ω
          rw [integral_sub (integrable_const _) (hS.integrable hp), integral_const,
            measure_univ, ENNReal.one_toReal, one_smul, hS_zero, sub_zero]
        _ ≤ ∫ ω, ∫ ω', ‖S ω - S ω'‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ω' ∂μ := by
          refine integral_mono_ae (hS.integrable_norm_rpow hp) ?_ ?_
          · exact Integrable.integral_prod_left <|
              (hS.prod_left μ).sub (hS.prod_right μ) |>.integrable_norm_rpow hp
          · filter_upwards with ω
            refine ConvexOn.map_integral_le (convexOn_norm.pow hp) inferInstance ?_ ?_
            · exact (hS.sub (hS.aestronglyMeasurable.const_aemeasurable)).aestronglyMeasurable
            · exact (hS.sub (hS.aestronglyMeasurable.const_aemeasurable)).integrable hp
        _ = ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ := by
          rw [integral_prod]
          · simp [X', S, sum_sub_distrib]
          · exact (hS.prod_left μ).sub (hS.prod_right μ) |>.integrable_norm_rpow hp

rw [← integral_univ_inv_smul μ (fun ω ↦ ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m))]
      have : (μ univ)⁻¹ • ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ =
          (μ univ)⁻¹ • ∫ ω, ‖∫ ω', ∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω - X i ω') ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
        congr! 2 with ω
        simp only [sum_sub_distrib, integral_sub, integral_sum_measure_univ_smul, integral_X,
          sum_const_zero, sub_zero]
      rw [this]
      refine (le_trans (le_of_eq ?_) (MeasureTheory.integral_norm_sub_le_integral_norm_sub_of_mean_zero
        (fun i ↦ (memLp_X i (by simp)).integrable two_pos) integral_X)).trans ?_
      · simp
      · rw [integral_prod, integral_univ_inv_smul]
    _ ≤ marcinkiewiczZygmundSymmConst (2 * m) * ∫ ω, (∑ i ∈ A, ‖X' i ω‖ ^ 2) ^ m ∂μ.prod μ :=
      marcinkiewicz_zygmund_symmetric
        (iIndepFun.sub (iIndepFun_X.comp _ measurable_fst) (iIndepFun_X.comp _ measurable_snd))
        (fun i ↦ (IdentDistrib.refl (hX i).aemeasurable_fst).sub (IdentDistrib.refl (hX i).aemeasurable_snd))
        hX'
    _ ≤ marcinkiewiczZygmundSymmConst (2 * m) * ∫ ω, (2 * (∑ i ∈ A, ‖X₁ i ω‖ ^ 2 + ‖X₂ i ω‖ ^ 2)) ^ m ∂μ.prod μ := by
      gcongr with ω
      rw [sum_add_distrib, mul_add]
      gcongr with i hi
      exact norm_sub_sq_le_two_mul_add_norm_sq (X₁ i ω) (X₂ i ω)
    _ = marcinkiewiczZygmundConst (2 * m) * ∫ ω, (∑ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) ^ m ∂μ := by
      simp only [marcinkiewiczZygmundConst, mul_pow, integral_mul_left, integral_prod]
      rw [lintegral_eq_integral_of_real]
      rotate_left
      · exact .pow (by gcongr; exact sum_nonneg fun _ _ ↦ by positivity) _
      · exact (integrable_X_pow_sum_sq m memLp_X).add (integrable_X_pow_sum_sq m memLp_X)
      simp only [X₁, X₂, Function.comp_apply, integral_add, integral_pow_sum_sq_X_fst,
        integral_pow_sum_sq_X_snd]
      gcongr
      -- Proof that E[(A+B)^m] ≤ 2^m E[A^m] for iid A, B
      sorry -- This requires convexity of x^m and independence, standard Lp bound

rcases m.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hm
      · simp [measure_univ, X']
      · have : IsProbabilityMeasure μ := by infer_instance
        simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, Pi.sub_apply, Function.comp_apply]
        calc

          _ = ∫ ω, ‖∫ ω', ∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω - X i ω') ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by

            simp [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, integral_finset_sum _ fun i hi => (memLp_X i hi).integrable,

            refine integral_mono_of_nonneg_ae (Eventually.of_forall fun _ => norm_nonneg _) (Eventually.of_forall fun ω => ?_)
            apply (convexOn_norm.pow (by linarith)).le_integral_of_ae
            · exact (Finset.integrable_sum _ fun i hi => (memLp_X i hi).integrable.sub ((memLp_X i hi).integrable.const _)).aestronglyMeasurable
            · exact Finset.integrable_sum _ fun i hi => (memLp_X i hi).integrable.sub ((memLp_X i hi).integrable.const _)
            · exact Eventually.of_forall fun _ => trivial
          _ = _ := by
            rw [← integral_prod]
            · congr
            · exact (Finset.integrable_sum _ fun i hi => (memLp_X i hi).integrable.fst.sub (memLp_X i hi).integrable.snd).norm.pow (2 * m)

simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, sum_sub_distrib]
      rcases m.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hm
      · simp

let S := ∑ i ∈ A, X i
      have hS : MemLp S (2 * m) μ := MemLp.sum _ fun i hi ↦ memLp_X i hi
      simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, sum_sub_distrib, Function.comp_apply, ← S]
      rcases m with rfl | m
      · simp [Measure.prod_univ]
      have hp : 1 ≤ (2 * (m + 1) : ℝ) := by norm_cast; linarith
      have hS_fst : MemLp (S ∘ Prod.fst) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) :=

      have hS_snd : MemLp (S ∘ Prod.snd) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) :=

      rw [integral_prod]

        · apply Integrable.integral_prod_right
          exact (hS_fst.sub hS_snd).integrable_norm_rpow hp
        · apply Filter.eventually_of_forall; intro x
          have h_mean : ∫ y, S y ∂μ = 0 := by
            simp only [S, integral_sum A (fun i _ ↦ (memLp_X i _).integrable hp)]
            trans ∑ i ∈ A, (0 : E); congr with i hi; exact integral_X i; simp
          have : S x = ∫ y, S x - S y ∂μ := by
            rw [integral_sub (integrable_const _) (hS.integrable hp),
                integral_const, h_mean, sub_zero, measure_univ, ENNReal.one_toReal, one_smul]
          rw [this]
          convert ConvexOn.map_integral_le (convexOn_norm_rpow hp) isProbabilityMeasure_univ
            ((memLp_const (S x)).sub hS).integrable hp using 1
          ext y; rw [Real.rpow_nat_cast]
      · exact (hS_fst.sub hS_snd).integrable_norm_rpow hp

simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, sum_sub_distrib]
      rw [integral_prod]
      · refine integral_mono_of_le_prop ((memLp_finset_sum _ memLp_X).integrable_norm_rpow coe_ne_top) ?_ ?_
        · exact (memLp_finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).comp_fst.sub (memLp_X i hi).comp_snd)).integrable_norm_rpow coe_ne_top |>.integral_prod_right
        · rintro ω -
          rcases m.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hm; · simp
          rw [← sub_zero (∑ i ∈ A, X i ω)]
          convert (convexOn_norm_pow (2 * m : ℝ) (by norm_cast; linarith)).map_sub_integral_le
            (integrable_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable (by norm_cast; linarith)) using 2
          simp only [integral_finset_sum A fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable (by norm_cast; linarith),
            integral_X, Finset.sum_const_zero]
      · exact (memLp_finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).comp_fst.sub (memLp_X i hi).comp_snd)).integrable_norm_rpow coe_ne_top

by_cases hm : m = 0
      · simp [hm]
      · have h_int (i) (hi : i ∈ A) : Integrable (X i) μ :=
          integrable_of_memLp (memLp_X i hi) <| one_le_two.trans <|
            Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hm)
        have h_cvx : ConvexOn ℝ Set.univ (fun x : E ↦ ‖x‖ ^ (2 * m)) :=
          convexOn_norm_pow (2 * m) (by norm_cast; exact one_le_two.trans (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hm)))
        calc
          ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ
          _ = ∫ ω, ‖∫ ω', ∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω - X i ω') ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
            simp_rw [integral_sub (integrable_const _) (integrable_finset_sum _ h_int),
              integral_finset_sum _ h_int, integral_const, Measure.measure_univ,
              ENNReal.one_toReal, one_smul, integral_X, Finset.sum_const_zero, sub_zero,
              Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
          _ ≤ ∫ ω, ∫ ω', ‖∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω - X i ω')‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ∂μ := by
            gcongr with ω
            apply ConvexOn.map_integral_le h_cvx
            · exact integrable_finset_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (h_int i hi).sub (integrable_const _)
            · exact ae_of_all _ fun _ ↦ measurableSet_univ
          _ = ∫ p : Ω × Ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i p‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ := by
            rw [← integral_prod]
            · congr with x; simp [X', X₁, X₂, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
            · refine (MemLp.sum ?_).integrable_norm_rpow (by norm_cast; exact one_le_two.trans (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hm)))
              intro i hi; exact (memLp_X i hi).comp_fst.sub (memLp_X i hi).comp_snd

have : IsProbabilityMeasure μ := ⟨by simpa using iIndepFun_X.measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul ∅ (fun _ ↦ Set.univ) (fun _ ↦ MeasurableSet.univ)⟩
      rcases m with rfl | m; · simp
      have hp : 1 ≤ (2 * (m + 1) : ℝ) := by norm_num
      let S := ∑ i ∈ A, X i
      have hS : MemLp S (2 * (m + 1)) μ := MemLp.finset_sum _ fun i hi ↦ memLp_X i hi
      have hS_int : Integrable S μ := hS.integrable (by norm_cast; exact hp)
      have hS0 : ∫ ω, S ω ∂μ = 0 := by
        simp [S, integral_finset_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable (by norm_cast; exact hp), integral_X]
      rw [integral_prod_eq_integral_integral_left]
      · simp only [X', sum_sub_distrib, X₁, X₂, comp_apply, Pi.sub_apply, ← S]
        refine integral_mono_ae (hS.norm_rpow_integrable (by linarith)) ?_ (.of_forall fun ω ↦ ?_)
        · exact ((hS.comp_fst μ).sub (hS.comp_snd μ)).norm_rpow_integrable (by linarith) |>.integral_prod_right
        · rw [← sub_zero (S ω), ← hS0]
          exact (convexOn_norm_pow _ hp).map_integral_le hS.aestronglyMeasurable hS_int
      · exact ((hS.comp_fst μ).sub (hS.comp_snd μ)).norm_rpow_integrable (by linarith)

rw [integral_prod]
      · refine integral_mono_ae (by sorry) (by sorry) (Eventually.of_forall fun ω ↦ ?_)
        have : ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω = ∫ ω', ∑ i ∈ A, (X i ω - X i ω') ∂μ := by
          simp only [integral_sub (by sorry) (by sorry), integral_sum, integral_X, integral_const,
            measure_univ, one_smul, sub_zero, sum_sub_distrib]
        rw [this]
        convert ConvexOn.map_integral_le (convexOn_norm.pow_convex (by sorry))
          (continuous_norm.pow _) (by sorry)
        simp [X', X₁, X₂, sum_sub_distrib]
      · sorry

simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, sum_sub_distrib]
      apply integral_norm_le_integral_norm_sub (fun i hi ↦ memLp_X i (2 * m) hi) integral_X
      exact convexOn_norm.pow (by simp) (by simp)

simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, sum_sub_distrib]
      calc
        ∫ ω, ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ
        _ = ∫ ω, ‖∫ ω', ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω - X i ω' ∂μ(ω')‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ := by
          congr with ω
          simp [integral_sub, integral_sum, integral_X, integral_const, measure_univ]
        _ ≤ ∫ ω, ∫ ω', ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω - X i ω'‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ(ω') ∂μ := by
          refine integral_mono_ae (integrable_norm_pow _ (integrable_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable _)) ?_
          filter_upwards with ω
          refine (convex_norm_pow _ (by omega)).le_integral_of_ae_mem Set.univ_mem ((integrable_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable _).sub (integrable_const _)) (by simp)
        _ = _ := (integral_prod _ ((integrable_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable_norm.pow _).sub (integrable_const _))).symm

rcases m.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hm
      · simp only [mul_zero, pow_zero, integral_const, Measure.prod_apply, univ_prod_univ,
          ENNReal.toReal_mul, le_refl]
      simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, Pi.sub_apply, sum_sub_distrib]
      let S := ∑ i ∈ A, X i
      have hS : MemLp S (2 * m) μ := Finset.memLp_sum _ memLp_X
      have hS_int : Integrable S μ := hS.integrable (one_le_two_mul hm)
      have hS_mean : ∫ ω, S ω ∂μ = 0 := by
        simp [S, integral_finset_sum _ fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable (one_le_two_mul hm),
          integral_X]
      rw [← integral_prod_mul_left]
      refine integral_mono_ae (hS.integrable_norm_pow (one_le_two_mul hm)) ?_ (ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ ?_)
      · apply Integrable.integral_prod_left
        exact (hS.fst.sub hS.snd).integrable_norm_pow (one_le_two_mul hm)
      calc
        ‖S ω‖ ^ (2 * m) = ‖∫ ω', S ω - S ω' ∂μ‖ ^ (2 * m) := by
          simp [integral_sub_left_eq_self _ hS_int, hS_mean, measure_univ]
        _ ≤ ∫ ω', ‖S ω - S ω'‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ :=
          (convexOn_norm.pow (one_le_two_mul hm)).jensen_integral_le_integral_ae (by simp)
            (hS_int.sub (integrable_const _)) (ae_of_all _ fun _ ↦ rfl)

simp_rw [X', X₁, X₂, sum_sub_distrib]
      let S := ∑ i ∈ A, X i
      have hS : MemLp S (2 * m) μ := MemLp.sum A memLp_X
      have hS0 : ∫ ω, S ω ∂μ = 0 := by
        rw [integral_finset_sum A (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).1), sum_eq_zero integral_X]
      rw [← integral_prod_mul_left_eq_integral (hS.norm.pow_of_nat (2 * m)).integrable, measure_univ, one_mul,
        integral_prod ((hS.fst.sub hS.snd).norm.pow_of_nat (2 * m)).integrable]
      refine integral_mono_ae (Measure.prod_integrable_fst (hS.norm.pow_of_nat (2 * m)).integrable)
        ((hS.fst.sub hS.snd).norm.pow_of_nat (2 * m)).integrable (eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ ?_)
      dsimp only
      rw [← hS0, ← integral_sub (integrable_const _) hS.1, integral_const, measure_univ, mul_one]
      exact ConvexOn.map_integral_le (convexOn_norm_pow (2 * m) (by simp)) measure_univ
        (hS.sub (MemLp.const _)).aestronglyMeasurable (hS.sub (MemLp.const _)).integrable

rcases m.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hm
      · simp
      · refine integral_pow_norm_sum_le_integral_pow_norm_sum_sub ?_ ?_ ?_
        · norm_cast; exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (mul_pos two_pos hm)
        · exact fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).aestronglyMeasurable
        · exact fun i _ ↦ integral_X i

simp_rw [X', Pi.sub_apply, sum_sub_distrib]
      apply integral_pow_norm_le_integral_pow_norm_sub_prod (le_refl _)
      simp only [integral_finset_sum A (fun i _ => (memLp_X i ‹_›).1), integral_X,
        Finset.sum_const_zero]

rcases m.eq_zero_or_pos with rfl | hm
      · simp
      · simp_rw [← Real.rpow_nat_cast]
        refine integral_norm_sum_le_integral_norm_sum_sub iIndepFun_X (fun i _ ↦ integral_X i) ?_ memLp_X
        norm_cast; exact one_le_two_mul hm

cases m with
      | zero => simp [measure_univ]
      | succ m =>
        let S := fun ω ↦ ∑ i ∈ A, X i ω
        have hS : MemLp S (2 * (m + 1)) μ :=
          MemLp.finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ memLp_X i hi)
        have hS_zero : ∫ ω, S ω ∂μ = 0 := by
          simp [S, integral_finset_sum _ (fun i hi ↦ (memLp_X i hi).integrable two_ne_zero), integral_X]
        rw [← integral_sub_integral_eq_self_of_integral_eq_zero hS.integrable two_ne_zero hS_zero,
          integral_prod_mul]
        gcongr with ω
        convert (convexOn_norm.pow (n := 2 * (m + 1)) (by omega)).map_integral_le
          (hS.integrable two_ne_zero).sub (integrable_const _) _ measure_univ using 2
        · simp [S, X', X₁, X₂, sum_sub_distrib]
        · exact (hS.sub (MemLp.const _)).integrable_norm_pow two_ne_zero
